title: Importance of Accessibility
description: A project designed to highlight the importance of web accessibility. It uses ARIA roles and attributes to improve screen reader support and ensures full keyboard navigation for a better user experience across all abilities.

title: Houser's Workshop
description: A small creative studio helping local businesses build websites and improve their marketing strategies. I work directly with clients to design custom, responsive sites and offer support with branding.

title: CarDeal
description: A web app that makes it easy for users to list and sell their cars with minimal effort. CarDeal streamlines the process by offering a clean interface, guided listing steps, and tools to attract potential buyers quickly.
